creator: josh@tcbug.org
text:
For the moment can the following patch be applied?

--- Makefile.old        2007-03-31 03:32:43.000000000 +0000
+++ Makefile    2008-03-08 19:10:43.000000000 +0000
@@ -24,6 +24,12 @@
 GNU_CONFIGURE= yes
 INSTALLS_SHLIB=        yes

+.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
+
+.if ${OSVERSION} >= 7
+CFLAGS+=       -g -O
+.endif
+
 .ifndef(WITH_DOXYGEN)
 NOPORTDOCS=    yes
 .endif
@@ -60,4 +66,4 @@
        @${INSTALL_DATA} ${INSTALL_WRKSRC}/doc/html/* ${DOCSDIR}
 .endif

-.include <bsd.port.mk>
+.include <bsd.port.post.mk>


-- 
Thanks,

Josh Paetzel

PGP: 8A48 EF36 5E9F 4EDA 5A8C 11B4 26F9 01F1 27AF AECB
